dimensions.notes: Mesh Z min is -3.0 because corner feet extend BELOW z=0 (foot_h=3). Mesh XY bbox is 108 x 254.9 because the widest shelf section spans 108mm and the full depth is 254.9mm; the printer section is a 86mm-wide inset (X=11..97) from Y=0..149 then tapers via a 45-degree chamfer to the full 108mm width at Y=160. Echoed envelopes match spec exactly.
Mesh Y max is 97.2 because pupil embosses protrude 3mm proud of the front wall exterior (Y=94.2). Echoed wall envelope (94.2mm) matches spec; pupils are intentional aesthetic relief.

features.name: corner_feet
features.description: Four 8mm-diameter, 3mm-tall dome feet inset 5mm from each outer corner of the stepped footprint (back-left & back-right at the narrow printer section, front-left & front-right at the wide shelf section). Feet extend below z=0 to elevate the cradle off the desk.

features.name: base_plate
features.description: Stepped base plate: 86mm wide at the printer section (Y=0..149, X=11..97), widening via a 45-degree chamfer (Y=149..160) to 108mm wide at the shelf section (Y=160..254.9). 4mm thick. Four OUTER corners rounded with 6mm fillets; chamfer endpoints also pick up 6mm rounding which leaves a clean ~3.5mm straight 45-degree segment at each step.

features.name: low_perimeter_walls
features.description: Stepped 25mm-tall low bathtub wall following the base plate outline. Printer section: 3mm side walls (X=11..14 and X=94..97), 3mm back wall (Y=0..3) and 3mm front wall (Y=157..160). Interior pocket 80x154mm at X=14..94, Y=3..157. Shelf section: 2.05mm side walls (X=0..2.05 and X=105.95..108), open top tray slot. 45-degree chamfer on the outside of the step from X=11 at Y=149 to X=0 at Y=160 (and mirror on the right side). Top edge receives a 1.5mm horizontal fillet via stacked quarter-round slices.

features.name: cable_slot
features.description: U-notch cut through the back wall of the printer section, 25mm wide x 20mm tall, centered at X=54 (= shelf midline, also = printer-section midline since both are centered), open at z=0 (no bridge). Fully within the 0-25mm low perimeter wall zone; back panel above z=20 is solid.

features.name: tray_shelf_upper_walls
features.description: Tall tray-slot walls, 108mm wide x 94.9mm deep (shelf footprint), rising from z=25 to z=46.3 (= base_thickness + slot_h). Slot interior 103.9 x 94.9 x 42.3mm carved through, open top and open front. 2.05mm side walls. 4mm vertical fillet on shelf's four exterior vertical corners. Top outer edge is LEFT SHARP (no 1.5mm top-edge fillet) to preserve full 2.05mm wall cross-section at the top two layers — a 1.5mm top roll-over would intersect the 4mm vertical corner fillet and cut wall cross-section to ~0.55mm (below FDM min wall). Slicer will add a tiny natural break-edge.

features.name: tall_back_panel_body
features.description: Tall back panel rising from z=0 to z=145mm, 86mm wide (X=11..97) x 3mm thick (Y=0..3). Matches the width of the printer section — centered. Top edge (z=145) receives a 1.5mm fillet on the front and back long edges via stacked quarter-round slices (inset clamped so wall thickness never goes below 0.2mm).

features.name: ear_tuft_left
features.description: Left owl ear tuft. Triangular 2D profile extruded 3mm (inherits back wall thickness). 25mm base along the back panel top (z=144..146 overlap ensures clean union with the rounded top), 35mm tall, peak at X=16, Y=0..3, Z=180. 2mm apex fillet.

features.name: ear_tuft_right
features.description: Right owl ear tuft. Symmetric mirror of left tuft; outer edge at X=97, peak at X=92, Z=180.

features.name: tray_shell
features.description: Open-top rectangular shell, 103.2 x 94.2 x 41.6mm exterior with 3mm vertical corner fillets. Walls 1.6mm, floor 1.6mm. Interior 100 x 91 x 40mm.

features.name: scoop_lip
features.description: 45-degree angled cut on the bottom 15mm of the front wall exterior with a 2mm rounded leading-edge fillet at the floor-bottom / scoop-face meeting line. The fillet arc is tangent to both Z=0 (floor bottom) and the 45-degree scoop face, centered at (Y=ext_d-scoop_h+r*(1-sqrt(2)), Z=r) ≈ (78.37, 2.0), produced directly via the cutter's 2D polygon which includes a quarter-circle arc between the two tangent points. Flagged: 45-degree angle is exactly at the FDM overhang threshold.

features.name: beak_emboss
features.description: Downward-pointing triangular beak, 6x6mm, raised 2mm proud of front wall. Top at z=22, apex at z=16 (just above scoop lip).

features.name: eye_emboss_left
features.description: Left owl eye emboss. Cylindrical disc r=8mm, +1.5mm proud of front wall, center at (X=ext_w/2-22, Y=ext_d, Z=28).

features.name: eye_emboss_right
features.description: Right owl eye emboss. Symmetric to left; center at (X=ext_w/2+22, Y=ext_d, Z=28).

features.name: pupil_emboss_left
features.description: Left pupil, concentric with left eye. r=3mm, +3mm total proud of wall (+1.5mm above eye disc).

features.name: pupil_emboss_right
features.description: Right pupil, concentric with right eye. r=3mm, +3mm total proud of wall.

features.name: grip_scallop
features.description: Semicircular scallop cut into the top edge of the front wall, 24mm wide x 8mm deep, centered on X. Open to the top (no bridge).

cradle.bed_face: base plate bottom (dome feet contact the bed)
cradle.z_direction: +Z = up; ear tuft peaks at top, feet at bottom

specDeviations.expected: Spec params list cradle_body_w=108. Revised design uses a stepped body: 86mm at the printer section and 108mm at the shelf section.
specDeviations.actual: 86mm at printer section (X=11..97), 108mm at shelf section (X=0..108), 45-degree chamfer transition at Y=149..160.
specDeviations.reason: User feedback (explicit): 14mm side walls from a constant-108mm body were too chunky. Stepped body gives true 3mm side walls at the printer section while preserving 2.05mm slot walls at the 108mm shelf. Echoed envelopes (cradle.x=108, cradle.y=254.9) still match spec since the mesh bbox X=108 is driven by the widest shelf section. Plastic volume reduced from 231.7cm^3 to 177.7cm^3 (-23%).

specDeviations.expected: 4mm vertical fillet on back panel's back-left and back-right exterior edges
specDeviations.actual: sharp vertical edges on back panel (no fillet)
specDeviations.reason: The back panel is 3mm thick (Y=0..3). A 4mm-radius fillet requires 4mm of material in both the X and Y directions to form; it is geometrically impossible on a 3mm-thin panel (would eat more than the panel thickness). The 4mm vertical fillet IS applied to the printer-section side walls and shelf-section exterior corners where material thickness permits. The back panel's left/right edges are at X=11 and X=97 where they meet the printer-section side walls (themselves filleted); above z=25 the back panel stands alone with sharp left/right edges. Visual impact minimal given the panel thickness (edge is only 3mm long in Y).
Pupil embosses protrude +3mm proud of front wall as intended per spec. The echoed tray:y=94.2 reports wall envelope for validator comparison; mesh bbox includes intentional relief.

printability_notes: Cradle cable slot: U-notch open at z=0, eliminates bridge (per spec).
Cradle tray slot: open top, eliminates ~104mm bridge (per spec).

Tray scoop face: exactly 45-degree from horizontal (FDM threshold); flagged for slicer review. Now has a 2mm rounded leading-edge fillet at the floor-meets-scoop-face corner (added this iteration per user feedback).
Cradle corner feet: 8mm dome, 3mm tall — shallow dome, self-supporting at 45-degree tangent.
Both parts watertight and manifold per trimesh analysis.

1.5mm top-edge fillets applied to low perimeter wall tops (all four sides of the printer section and shelf section at z=25) and to the back panel top body edge at z=145 (between tuft bases). Implemented via stacked quarter-round slices (6 steps for walls, 5 steps for back panel with thickness clamp). The tray-shelf upper walls (z=25..46.3, x=0..2.05 and x=105.95..108) are deliberately LEFT SHARP at their z=46.3 top edge because the 2.05mm wall thickness cannot accommodate a 1.5mm top fillet adjacent to the 4mm vertical corner fillet without dropping cross-section below FDM min wall. Full 2.05mm wall thickness is preserved at the top two layers.
45-degree step chamfer between 86mm printer section and 108mm shelf section is fully vertical (straight extrusion in Z); no print-direction overhang concerns.
